---
title: "spearman_correlation"
format: html
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(ggplot2)
library(scoutR)
data("cars")

initialize_scoutR("dYy6mTfIimyXAsG5aDnNb0ng01QDge0bgA8A7mwNWKvIOhNyON69HsZmMD0g2klS")

spearman_correlation <- function(event) {
    event_opr <- event_oprs(event)
    event_ranking <- event_rankings(event)
    
    opr_data <- event_opr |>
    select(opr, team) |>
        mutate(
        team = paste0("frc", team)
        )
    
    ranking_data <- event_ranking |>
        select(`Ranking Score`, team_key)
    
    ranking_data_renamed <- ranking_data |>
        rename(team = team_key)
    
    opr_and_ranking <- merge(ranking_data_renamed, opr_data)
    
    corr <- cor.test(x=opr_and_ranking$`Ranking Score`, 
                     y=opr_and_ranking$opr, method = 'spearman')
    
    graph <- ggplot(
        opr_and_ranking,
        aes( x = `Ranking Score`, y = opr)) + 
        geom_point() +
        theme_bw() + 
        labs(
    title = paste0(
        "Spearman Correlation: ", corr$estimate)
    )
    
    print(graph)
}

correlation <- spearman_correlation("2025mil")
```
